Uses of Class
nonprofitbookkeeping.model.Ledger

Packages that use Ledger
Package
Description
nonprofitbookkeeping.model
Contains core domain and transfer models.
nonprofitbookkeeping.service
Implements application service-layer use cases.
nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.panels
Contains UI panel implementations for major screens.

  • Uses of Ledger in nonprofitbookkeeping.model

    Methods in nonprofitbookkeeping.model that return Ledger
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Ledger
    Company.getLedger()
    Gets the company's ledger, which contains all financial transactions.
    Methods in nonprofitbookkeeping.model with parameters of type Ledger
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    Fund.addAccount(String accountId, Ledger ledger)
    Adds an account to this fund if it's not already present and updates the balance using the provided ledger.
    void
    Fund.removeAccount(String accountId, Ledger ledger)
    Removes an account from this fund and optionally recalculates the balance using the provided ledger.
    void
    Company.setLedger(Ledger ledger)
    Sets the company's ledger.
    BigDecimal
    Account.totalAccountBalance(Ledger ledger)
    Calculates the accountâ€™s balance by summing its opening balance and all AccountingEntry records for this account in the provided Ledger.
    void
    Fund.updateBalance(Ledger ledger)
    Updates (recalculates) the balance of this fund by summing the balances (obtained via Account.totalAccountBalance(Ledger)) of all accounts currently associated with this fund.

  • Uses of Ledger in nonprofitbookkeeping.service

    Methods in nonprofitbookkeeping.service with parameters of type Ledger
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static double
    FinancialFormulaService.applyFormulas(Ledger ledger)
    Applies a predefined set of financial formulas to the given Ledger.
    static List<AccountService.AccountBalance>
    AccountService.getBalanceResults(Ledger ledger)
    Retrieves the balance for all accounts currently managed by this service.
    static List<AccountingTransaction>
    FileImportService.importOFXorQIFFile(File file, Account targetAccountInCOA, ChartOfAccounts chartOfAccounts, Ledger ledger)
    Imports transactions from a specified file (OFX or QIF) and maps them to accounting transactions.
    (package private) static List<AccountingTransaction>
    FileImportService.mapToAccountingTransactions(List<ImportedTransaction> importedTxns, Account targetAccount, ChartOfAccounts chartOfAccounts, Ledger existingLedger)
    Maps a list of ImportedTransaction objects to a list of AccountingTransaction objects.
